phrases.intent_en: Ask where to pay for parking
phrases.cultural_note: Portuguese tourist offices typically direct visitors to specific automated terminals for parking fees to reduce queue times.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso comprar o Sintra Card?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo koomp-RAHR AW SEENT-ruh KAH-ruhd?

likely_response.local: Dirija-se à Bilheteira Carris para comprar o Sintra Card.
likely_response.pronunciation: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh kuh-REESH PUH-ruh koomp-RAHR AW SEENT-ruh KAH-ruhd.
likely_response.translation_en: Go to the Carris ticket counter to buy the Sintra Card.

responses.english: Go to the Carris ticket counter to buy the Sintra Card.
responses.phonetic: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh kuh-REESH PUH-ruh koomp-RAHR AW SEENT-ruh KAH-ruhd.
responses.local: Dirija-se à Bilheteira Carris para comprar o Sintra Card.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to buy Pena tickets
phrases.text_local: Onde posso comprar bilhetes para a Pena?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo koomp-RAHR bee-LYEH-tihsh PUH-ruh AH PEH-nuh?
phrases.cultural_note: Ticket counters in Portugal are often numbered sequentially; staff provide direct numerical directions to avoid confusion.

likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, go to the ticket office.

responses.english: Good morning, go to the ticket office.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to pay for parking
phrases.text_local: Bom dia, onde posso pagar o estacionamento?
phrases.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, OHNG-dih PAW-soo puh-GAHR AW shtuh-seeoo-nuh-MAYNG-too?
phrases.cultural_note: Parking payment is done at designated machines; keep the ticket for validation.

likely_response.local: Na máquina de pagamento, perto da saída.
likely_response.pronunciation: NUH MAH-kee-nuh DIH puh-guh-MAYNG-too, PEHR-too DUH SUHEE-duh.
likely_response.translation_en: At the payment machine, near the exit.

responses.english: At the payment machine, near the exit.
responses.phonetic: NUH MAH-kee-nuh DIH puh-guh-MAYNG-too, PEHR-too DUH SUHEE-duh.
responses.local: Na máquina de pagamento, perto da saída.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso comprar o Sintra Card?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo koomp-RAHR AW SEENT-ruh KAH-ruhd?

likely_response.local: No balcão da entrada, à direita.
likely_response.pronunciation: NOO bahl-KOWN DUH ayngt-RAH-duh, AH dee-RAY-tuh.
likely_response.translation_en: You can buy the Sintra Card at the tourist office attendant.

responses.english: You can buy the Sintra Card at the tourist office attendant.
responses.phonetic: NOO bahl-KOWN DUH ayngt-RAH-duh, AH dee-RAY-tuh.
responses.local: No balcão da entrada, à direita.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Bilheteira Carris is
phrases.text_local: Bom dia, onde fica a Bilheteira Carris?
phrases.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh kuh-REESH?
phrases.cultural_note: The Bilheteira Carris sells tickets for bus 435 and other Carris services in Sintra.

likely_response.local: Ao lado da entrada principal, à direita.
likely_response.pronunciation: OW LAH-doo DUH ayngt-RAH-duh preen-see-PAHL, AH dee-RAY-tuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Next to the main entrance, on the right.

responses.english: Next to the main entrance, on the right.
responses.phonetic: OW LAH-doo DUH ayngt-RAH-duh preen-see-PAHL, AH dee-RAY-tuh.
responses.local: Ao lado da entrada principal, à direita.
